label: volve_15_9_F_15A_F_11_T2_joint_eikonal_2d
scope_notes: 2D Vp(w, z) joint inversion of both wells' picks; eikonal forward via FMM on a 40 m cell grid; lateral-translation-symmetry trick of phase 4 is not available (Vp now varies laterally). Cost scaled with number of UNIQUE source grid cells, which is ~32 (sources cluster).
Per-well sonic validation samples the ensemble Vp at the well's w-column on the grid; this assumes the well bore is vertical at that w. For deviated wells this approximation spreads sonic error.
F-11 T2 sonic LAS uses MD; for now we equate MD with TVD (near-vertical assumption above ~3 km), which contributes to that well's sonic-inside rate.
